ItacAcademyItem.Name: Pacifici (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of this academy, not in British Library collections, include: Barbaro, Antonio, La patria difesa nell`accademia delli pacifici consacrata al sublime merito dell`illustrissimo ... Antonio Barbaro.. (In Padova: per il Pasquati, 1672)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
